---
title: "World Cup 2026 Forecasting Model"
subtitle: "LindaData command center for static match probabilities, projected scores, and tournament paths."
description: "A readable LindaData World Cup 2026 forecasting site with match probabilities, expected scores, bracket projections, data freshness notes, model performance monitoring, and clear project routing."
image: assets/social-preview.png
toc: false
number-sections: false
code-tools: false
code-fold: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
root <- if (file.exists("data/processed/modeling")) "." else ".."
source(file.path(root, "R", "report_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(root, "R", "matchday_components.R"))
source(file.path(root, "R", "static_readability_overrides.R"))
bundle <- load_matchday_bundle(root)
board <- bundle$board
summary <- bundle$summary
```

<style>
.ld-project-hq {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(260px, 0.8fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 0.25rem 0 1.25rem;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.35rem);
  border: 1px solid rgba(15, 107, 104, 0.22);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(217, 164, 65, 0.20), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #102a43 0%, #0f4f4d 100%);
  color: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16);
}
.ld-project-hq h2 {
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0.45rem;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3vw, 2.35rem);
  line-height: 1.05;
}
.ld-project-hq p,
.ld-project-hq span,
.ld-project-hq small {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84);
}
.ld-project-hq .section-kicker {
  color: #f5d27a;
}
.ld-hq-actions,
.ld-quick-nav {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}
.ld-hq-actions a,
.ld-quick-nav a {
  min-height: 42px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.78rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.ld-hq-actions a:first-child {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #0b4f4d;
}
.ld-hq-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.65rem;
  align-content: start;
}
.ld-hq-status,
.ld-route-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  padding: 0.72rem;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.ld-hq-status span,
.ld-route-card span {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.18rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.ld-hq-status strong,
.ld-route-card strong {
  display: block;
  color: #ffffff;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.ld-hq-grid,
.ld-workflow-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.35rem;
}
.ld-hq-card,
.ld-workflow-card {
  border: 1px solid #dbe3eb;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0.85rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
}
.ld-hq-card span,
.ld-workflow-card span {
  display: block;
  color: #0f6b68;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.ld-hq-card strong,
.ld-workflow-card strong {
  display: block;
  margin: 0.18rem 0;
  color: #17252a;
  font-size: 1.02rem;
}
.ld-hq-card p,
.ld-workflow-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #52616b;
  font-size: 0.91rem;
}
.ld-review-note {
  border-left: 4px solid #d9a441;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #fffaf0;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.25rem;
  color: #405261;
}
.ld-review-note strong {
  color: #17252a;
}
@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .ld-project-hq {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    border-radius: 14px;
  }
  .ld-hq-actions a,
  .ld-quick-nav a {
    flex: 1 1 100%;
  }
}
</style>

<section id="lindadata-project-hq" class="ld-project-hq" aria-labelledby="ld-hq-title">
  <div>
    <span class="section-kicker">LindaData project HQ</span>
    <h2 id="ld-hq-title">World Cup forecast command center</h2>
    <p>Use this as the top-level dashboard for current picks, bracket paths, model health, data coverage, and executive routing. Forecasts come first; methodology stays one click away.</p>
    <div class="ld-hq-actions" aria-label="Primary project actions">
      <a href="#model-board">Open model board</a>
      <a href="reports/08_matchday_predictions.html">Full predictions</a>
      <a href="reports/08_matchday_predictions.html#bracket">Bracket</a>
      <a href="reports/00_data_overview.html">Data coverage</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ld-hq-panel" aria-label="Project routing and status">
    <div class="ld-hq-status"><span>Status</span><strong>Active public research site</strong><small>Static, public-safe, no credentials or private feeds exposed.</small></div>
    <div class="ld-route-card"><span>Executive route</span><strong>CDO model quality · CTO pipeline and site · COO publishing flow</strong></div>
    <div class="ld-route-card"><span>Review rule</span><strong>Improve readability first; promote model changes only after backtesting.</strong></div>
  </div>
</section>

<nav class="ld-quick-nav" aria-label="World Cup forecast shortcuts">
  <a href="#today">Current slate</a>
  <a href="#next-match">Next match</a>
  <a href="#model-review">Model review</a>
  <a href="#bracket-preview">Bracket preview</a>
  <a href="#champion-outlook">Champion outlook</a>
</nav>

<section class="page-section" id="start-here">
  <div class="section-heading">
    <span class="section-kicker">Start here</span>
    <h2>Morning review flow</h2>
    <p>Read the page in this order so the project stays easy to manage on mobile.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="ld-workflow-grid">
    <div class="ld-workflow-card"><span>1</span><strong>Current board</strong><p>Check model pick, probability edge, expected score, and forecast timestamp.</p></div>
    <div class="ld-workflow-card"><span>2</span><strong>Model review</strong><p>Scan hit rate, misses, draw calibration, and score error before trusting upgrades.</p></div>
    <div class="ld-workflow-card"><span>3</span><strong>Bracket path</strong><p>Use the bracket and champion outlook for tournament-level storylines.</p></div>
    <div class="ld-workflow-card"><span>4</span><strong>Escalate gaps</strong><p>Route data gaps, UI issues, or model concerns through the LindaData org.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

```{r hero, results="asis"}
cat(render_home_hero(summary, board))
cat(render_quick_status(summary))
cat(render_model_market_board(
  board,
  title = "Current Model Board",
  subtitle = "A compact forecast board with the current slate and next available matches.",
  limit = 6,
  section_id = "model-board"
))
cat(render_forecast_command_center(bundle, board, compact = TRUE, base_path = "reports/08_matchday_predictions.html"))
cat(render_model_suite_strip(bundle, compact = TRUE, base_path = "reports/10_model_challengers.html"))
cat(render_model_review_section(bundle, compact = TRUE, limit = 5))
```

```{r static-note, results="asis"}
cat(render_static_api_note(summary))
```

<div class="ld-review-note"><strong>Project standard:</strong> this site should stay prediction-first, mobile-readable, and public-safe. Model changes should be routed through the CDO review path; site and refresh issues should route through CTO/COO.</div>

```{r today, results="asis"}
cat(render_today_section(board, summary))
```

```{r next-match, results="asis"}
cat(render_next_match_section(board))
```

```{r upcoming, results="asis"}
cat(render_upcoming_section(board, limit = 3))
```

```{r bracket-preview, results="asis"}
cat('<section id="bracket-preview" class="page-section">')
cat('<div class="section-heading">')
cat('<span class="section-kicker">Tournament outlook</span>')
cat('<h2>Bracket Preview</h2>')
cat('<p>The bracket starts from projected group seeds. Open the full Predictions page for the larger bracket and performance notes.</p>')
cat('</div>')
cat(render_bracket(root, preview = TRUE))
cat('<p><a class="button-secondary" href="reports/08_matchday_predictions.html#bracket">Open full bracket</a></p>')
cat('</section>')
```

```{r champion-outlook, results="asis"}
cat(render_champion_section(bundle, compact = TRUE))
```

```{r methodology, results="asis"}
cat(render_methodology_short())
```

## Limitations

This forecast is probabilistic. Lineups, injuries, card projections, and provider feeds update when the connected sources make those records available. Current tournament accuracy should be interpreted carefully because completed-match sample sizes are still small.

This is not a live betting terminal. It is a LindaData research dashboard that separates public forecasts, model review, and data coverage so decisions can be checked before action.

<p class="responsible-note">Responsible use: this site presents statistical forecasts for education and research. Always verify official match information before making decisions.</p>
